1kw-solar-system.html.title: 1kW Solar System Price, Subsidy & Savings Guide (2026)
1kw-solar-system.html.description: Learn the cost, subsidy, savings, annual generation, roof area and panel requirements for a 1kW rooftop solar system in India.

faq.question: How much electricity can a 1kW solar system generate?
faq.answer: A well-designed 1kW solar system typically generates approximately 1,400–1,600 units annually depending on location and weather conditions.

faq.question: How much roof space is required?
faq.answer: Most installations require approximately 80–120 square feet of shadow-free roof area.

faq.question: Can batteries be added later?
faq.answer: Many systems can be upgraded later with battery storage depending on inverter compatibility.

faq.question: Is subsidy guaranteed?
faq.answer: No. Subsidies are subject to government policies, eligibility criteria and approval processes.

faq.answer: A well-designed 2kW solar system typically generates approximately 2,800–3,200 units annually depending on location and weather conditions.

faq.question: How much roof space is required?
faq.answer: Most installations require approximately 160–220 square feet of shadow-free roof area.

faq.question: Can batteries be added later?
faq.answer: Many systems can be upgraded later with battery storage depending on inverter compatibility.

faq.question: Is subsidy guaranteed?
faq.answer: No. Subsidies are subject to government policies, eligibility criteria and approval processes.

faq.question: How much electricity can a 3kW solar system generate?
faq.answer: Generation depends on location, weather and installation quality. Actual output varies.

faq.answer: Many systems can be upgraded later with battery storage, subject to technical compatibility.

faq.answer: No. Subsidies are subject to government policies, eligibility criteria and approval processes.

solar-loan-financing.html.title: Solar Loan & Financing Guide India (2026) | Solar AI Advisor
solar-loan-financing.html.description: Learn how solar financing works in India including solar loans, EMI options, rooftop solar funding and zero upfront solar programs.

faq.question: Can I finance an entire solar installation?
faq.answer: Financing availability depends on lender policies, eligibility criteria and project requirements.

faq.question: Will my electricity savings cover my EMI?
faq.answer: Actual results vary depending on electricity usage, financing terms, solar generation and local tariffs.

faq.question: Can I prepay a solar loan?
faq.answer: Many lenders permit prepayment, although terms and charges may vary.

faq.question: Does financing affect subsidy eligibility?
faq.answer: Financing and subsidy eligibility are generally separate considerations, subject to applicable program requirements.

net-metering-guide.html.title: Net Metering Guide | Solar AI Advisor

solar-for-homeowners.html.title: Solar For Homeowners India (2026) | Solar AI Advisor
solar-for-homeowners.html.description: Learn whether rooftop solar is right for your home. Understand costs, savings, subsidies, financing and key homeowner considerations before installing solar.

faq.question: How much roof space is needed for solar?
faq.answer: Required roof area depends on system size, panel efficiency and installation layout.

faq.question: Can solar work during cloudy weather?
faq.answer: Yes. Solar panels continue generating electricity during cloudy conditions, although production may be lower.

faq.question: Do I need batteries?
faq.answer: Many residential solar systems operate without batteries. The best solution depends on your goals and local conditions.

faq.question: How long do solar panels last?
faq.answer: Modern solar panels are designed for long operational lifetimes and often carry performance warranties extending decades.

solar-for-businesses.html.title: Commercial Solar For Businesses India (2026) | Solar AI Advisor
solar-for-businesses.html.description: Learn how businesses can reduce electricity costs with rooftop solar. Understand commercial solar benefits, financing, net metering and long-term savings.

faq.question: Can businesses install rooftop solar?
faq.answer: Many commercial properties can install rooftop solar, subject to technical and regulatory requirements.

faq.question: Is solar suitable for small businesses?
faq.answer: Suitability depends on electricity consumption, roof availability and financial objectives.

faq.question: Can solar improve business profitability?
faq.answer: Reducing electricity expenses may improve long-term operating margins, depending on project performance and energy usage.

faq.question: How long do commercial solar systems last?
faq.answer: Commercial solar systems are typically designed for long operating lifetimes and often include extensive manufacturer warranties.
